text:
Market today: The market lacks clear direction from today's headlines, which are mostly noise. Your tech and chip names remain highly exposed to sector-specific movements, amplified by your margin usage.

Your holdings: SOXL is a major concern, down -28.7% and a leveraged ETF prone to decay. QQQI is marked for TRIM at -1.86%. SPAL, a new leveraged ETF, is already down -9.58% and needs close watching due to its nature and your margin.

Watch: Keep an eye on SMH and XLK for potential long entries if they hit their scanner levels, as both are core to your sector focus.

Bottom line: Prioritize managing your leveraged positions and respecting stops to protect capital in your concentrated book.
plays: Address SOXL's "SELL" status and -28.7% loss on this leveraged, decaying ETF. Respect the 200 stop.
Follow through on the "TRIM" status for QQQI, currently down -1.86%. Respect the 52 stop.
SMH scanner shows a "BUY" at 586.43-584.71 with a stop at 580.88. This chip ETF aligns well with your portfolio.
